# YourPetPass

> YourPetPass is a pet health records and travel planning app for dog and cat parents.
> It stores vaccination history, vet visit records, allergies, and medications
> in one place, generates AI-powered travel requirement checklists for flying
> , driving, or any trip with a dog or cat, scans vet documents automatically using AI, and
> provides a QR-code emergency health card.

YourPetPass is built for dog and cat parents who:
- See multiple veterinarians across different cities or after relocating
- Travel domestically or internationally with their dog or cat
- Board, use daycare, or use pet-sitting services and need to share health records quickly
- Want a single source of truth for their pet's health history

## Key Features

- Health records: vaccines, vet visits, allergies, medications — tied to the pet, not a single clinic
- AI document scanning: photograph any vet record or vaccine card to auto-extract and save data
- AI travel checklists: route-specific requirements for flying, driving, or any trip with a dog or cat, including health certificates and airline pet policies
- QR emergency health card: a public, no-login page for sitters, boarding facilities, or lost-pet situations
- Export and share: generate a complete health summary and email it to a vet, hotel, or daycare

## Pricing

- Free plan: core health record storage
- Premium Monthly: $4.99/month
- Premium Annual: $39.99/year
- Premium Lifetime: $89.99 one-time

Premium unlocks AI document scanning, AI travel checklists, weight tracking, document storage, and the QR emergency health card.

  - What Vaccines Does My Dog Need Before Flying: https://yourpetpass.com/blog/dog-vaccines-before-flying.html
  - How to Keep Pet Health Records Straight When You Travel: https://yourpetpass.com/blog/pet-records-when-traveling.html
  - Pet Health Certificates Explained: https://yourpetpass.com/blog/pet-health-certificates-explained.html
  - Moving Across the Country With Pets: https://yourpetpass.com/blog/moving-across-country-with-pets.html
- Real-world use cases:
  - Switching vets without losing your pet's history: https://yourpetpass.com/use-cases/switching-vets.html
  - International pet travel documents explained: https://yourpetpass.com/use-cases/pet-travel-documents.html
